evidence.git: NONE — /root/hoch_agent_swarm is not a git repo (stale copy)

existing_helm_on_node.risk: 5 services report ACTIVE while doing zero work -- a fake-green that makes the node look busy. They hold no authority/leases/pointer, so NOT a two-scheduler hazard, but they must be stopped+disabled before the new control plane deploys, so the cloud wall reflects real state.
existing_helm_on_node.recommendation: STOP+DISABLE the 5 units (snapshot their unit files first). Keep the 3 legit docker containers (hoch-relay-api, proxy, ollama).

disk.verdict: HARD BLOCKER — resize required (billable, FOUNDER GATE)
disk.why_blocking: Postgres + a 10-container HELM stack cannot deploy into 1.6G. Need >=30G free headroom.

options.resize_disk: Linode plan/volume resize. Current plan is 24GB High-Mem ($60/mo owned). A bigger disk or an attached Block Storage volume (e.g. +80GB ~ $8/mo) would give Postgres+evidence room. BILLABLE -> founder gate.
options.block_storage: Attach a Linode Block Storage volume for /var/lib/helm/postgres + evidence. ~$0.10/GB-mo. 100GB ~ $10/mo, within the $5-15 backup budget.
